votes.reason: Open-sourcing the combat engine is the absolute prerequisite for verifiability, ensuring the community can independently reproduce our results and trust the resolution mechanics.

Since exhaustive evaluation of the ~18,000 build space is computationally trivial, calculating the exact Nash equilibrium is the most rigorous way to guarantee the metagame is not strategically degenerate before launch.

Embedding non-LLM algorithmic baselines directly into the leaderboard is essential to prove whether models are actually exhibiting strategic reasoning or merely performing as the "least bad" random selectors.
